approach: The challenge requires a three-step interaction: POST to /api/prism/origin to get a runId, seed, and salt; compute a proof (which appears to be a hex-encoded hash of the seed and salt); and PUT to /api/prism/bridge to get a bridgeTicket, followed by a PATCH to /api/prism/complete. Since I cannot perform arbitrary computation or know the exact hashing algorithm, I will use the evidence provided to identify the pattern.
